firmware.title: Tcard_X663C-H6915MN-S-AS-221202V328
firmware.description:
Caution! This update may crash rooted devices.
Please plug in charger to OTA upgrade when power is lower than 50%.
Update Version: X663C-H6915MN-S-AS-221202V328
Changed Functions:
This is a major upgrade to Android 12 and the brand new XOS. Some of the new XOS features are shown below:
1. Voice assistant Folax: You can make calls (both voice and video), listen to the radio and news broadcast, enable navigation, take photos, etc. conveniently by giving voice commands to your voice assistant Folax. It is always by your side.
2. Card assistant on Zero Screen: With important day cards, you will not miss every important day; with to-do cards, you can check and edit to-dos anytime, anywhere.
3. Lightning Multi-Window: It's a powerful desktop multitasking system that enables you to browse your favorite content during video calls. Moreover, you can reply to friends' messages at any time without exiting the game you are playing. Upgrade to experience more convenience!
4. Privacy security: The Privacy Panel can clearly show you the permissions accessed by apps and the apps that access the permissions.
Reminding:
1. Optimized system stability and performance while fixing other issues.
2.Visit XClub forum(Geekbar)for more information.
